steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: The talayot of Son Fornes, Mallorca. A warm afternoon under the Mediterranean sun.

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: ...zzzzZZzzzz....

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Ramon, a talayotic foner, naps against the stones. Nearby, his myotragus companion Bep grazes.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *munch munch*

steps.speaker: Narrator
steps.text: Bep wanders toward an old altar, half-hidden among the rocks. Strange herbs grow around it.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *Ooh, these herbs smell nice...*

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *mmm, Mixed herbs! My favorite!*

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: *chomp*

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: WHO DARES DEFILE MY ALTAR?!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: ...what.

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: Your wretched beast has devoured my sacred herbs! These take longer than those herbs of Poseidon to grow back!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Beeeeeep

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Who on earth are you? Do you come from the sea?

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: SILENCE! I have inhabited this land way before your species even existed show some respect and apologize for your beast's actions!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: I mean he's a myotragus. He eats things. That's what he does.

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: SILENCE! Your beast has now stolen a piece of my power. Give it back and accept your punishment!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Ew! I am not sticking my hand in there! I would need to cut it afterwards! No thanks!

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: SILENCE! Show some respect my power is beyond your comprehension. Actually...

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: ... the power this beast stole will be your punishment. Every demon on this island will sense him now!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Bep why can't your stay still?! You are always getting me into trouble!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Well I was hungry man what could I do?!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: ...Bep?

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: What, I was hungry! You never let me try your food

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Why are you talking?!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: What?! Wow, Why am I talking?! My stomach hurts like crazy!

steps.speaker: Es Dimoni de Sant Joan
steps.text: HAHAHAHA. Consider it a gift. Or a side effect of my power. Either way, you will both suffer for this. Now get out of my sight!

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: Ramon, what do we do?! He cursed me! I'm a TALKING GOAT now!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Great.

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: This is your fault, Bep.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: MY fault?! You were supposed to be watching me!

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: I was napping.

steps.speaker: Bep
steps.text: ...So what now?

steps.speaker: Ramon
steps.text: Now we walk. And you stop eating things.
